name: igrep-cashbook
description: Calculates the balance of a cashbook formatted by my original format.

scripts.custard-transpile: node ../../pkgs/command/dist/custard.js transpile -vp .provided-symbols.cstd src/lib.cstd src/index.cstd src/select-by-date.cstd src/sum-expenditure.cstd src/name-and-amount.cstd src/compose-ntfy-request-body.cstd

author: YAMAMOTO Yuji
